title: Link's Heroes
description: A Modpack designed by me around the Palladium mod and any mods/addons that use it as a dependency that I want to include. The pack adds some technology and mystical elements but is focused around superpowers, I try not to deviate from vanilla too much.
body:
A Modpack designed by me around the Palladium mod alongside any mods/addons that use it as a dependency that I want to include. The pack adds some technology and mystical elements but is focused around superpowers, I try not to deviate from vanilla too much.

Currently Link's Heroes is focused around FSang18's Heropack & PantheonSent, I plan to include Alien Evolution when it releases a public beta and I might include some other Palladium addons if they fit with the extended vanilla theme of the pack: it depends on how I want to balance the superpowers and if I think all of them fit together well.
